details: The agent never delivered a final answer to the user. The trajectory ends with diagnostic commands still running. Additionally, PR #52545's CI data was misinterpreted (Python parsed YAML as CSV, producing garbage conclusions and wrongly labeling it 'ALL GREEN' when 10 checks were still in_progress/queued). The task required a complete formatted report with title, author, and CI status for all 10 PRs plus a final green count — none of which was produced.
